title: Client(Plus)
description: Client side minecraft modpack for a faster, cleaner, and more visually refined experience. It boosts performance, adds thoughtful quality-of-life improvements, and includes immersive visual upgrades.
body:
![A modpack banenr](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ee06472fd8c9d63d3a56eaadfd0cf600db338cd9_0.webp)

# 🌟Client(Plus)
Client(Plus) is a finely tuned, lightweight client-side Minecraft modpack designed to maximize performance, enhance visuals, and boost everyday usability—all without altering core gameplay. Built on the powerful foundation of Fabulously Optimized, Client(Plus) brings your Minecraft experience to the next level with smarter performance, better interfaces, and beautifully refined visuals.

Whether you're on a low-end PC or want more frames for your shaders, Client(Plus) gives you a smoother, cleaner, and more beautiful way to enjoy vanilla Minecraft.

[![Built on Fabulously Optimized](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/built-with/fabulously-optimized_64h.png)](https://download.fo)

## ⚙️ Key Features
🚀 **Performance Optimization**:
Built on Fabulously Optimized, including top-tier performance mods:

- Sodium – lightning-fast rendering engine
- Lithium – efficient game logic processing
- ScalableLux – instant light engine overhaul
- FerriteCore, and more for memory and CPU optimization

🎮 **Quality of Life Improvements**:

- Mod Menu – easily view and configure your mods
- Sodium Extra / Reese’s Sodium Options – fine-tune video settings
- Zoomify – smooth, customizable zoom feature
- AppleSkin / REI / IPN – clear, helpful overlays
- Mouse Tweaks – better inventory and keybind control
- Dynamic FPS – conserve power and reduce heat when idle or tabbed out

🎨 **Visual Enhancements**:
Supports stylized resource packs and mods like:

- Not Enough Animations (Resource Pack) – adds missing third-person animations like eating, blocking, and swimming for a more immersive look
- Fogolous (Mod) – enhances the look of fog to blend more naturally with biomes and lighting
- Iris Shaders – enables beautiful shader support with full Sodium compatibility

## 🤖 Ideal For:

- Players wanting a boost in FPS and better overall responsiveness
- Anyone looking for subtle, immersive visual polish
- Streamers, content creators, and everyday players who want a clean Vanilla++ experience
